changelog: Compatibility: targets Jellyfin 12.0.0.0 beta while keeping plugin version 1.7.0.0. Scheduler: renames the main task to Rotate pools while keeping the stable task key. Performance: stores PluginData pools in Jellyfin.Plugin.PosterRotator.pools, uses index-only listing for very large libraries, and batches index writes. Interface: keeps Pools as the default tab, serves reduced server-side pool previews via ApiKey preview URLs, and adds configurable language fallback controls. Packaging: includes a local plugin image for manual zip installs.
description: Fill a local poster pool per movie from providers, then periodically rotate the Primary Poster image from the pool. This keeps Jellyfin looking fresh with rotating poster images on an interval of your choosing.
name: Poster Rotator
